chosen.theme: G7 Synchronized Rate Hold — Hormuz Energy Shock Locks All Major Central Banks Into Monetary Paralysis Simultaneously
chosen.news_one_liner: April jobs beat validates Fed hold while BOJ goes hawkish on $100+ oil, leaving no accommodative G10 anchor and tightening global financial conditions from all directions.

candidates.theme: G7 Synchronized Rate Hold — Hormuz Energy Shock Locks All Major Central Banks Into Monetary Paralysis Simultaneously
candidates.news_one_liner: April jobs beat validates Fed hold while BOJ goes hawkish on $100+ oil, leaving no accommodative G10 anchor and tightening global financial conditions from all directions.

candidates.theme: Trump-Xi Summit Imminent — US-China Trade War Ceasefire Potential Emerges as Highest-Impact Binary Catalyst for Global Equities
candidates.news_one_liner: Trump-Xi summit goes live this week alongside CPI/PPI data, making it the highest-stakes binary macro event of the cycle for global equities and tech.

candidates.theme: AI Capex Supercycle Redirects Institutional Flows Into Semiconductors — Chip ETFs Dominate 2026 Inflows as Big Tech Loses Narrative Leadership
candidates.news_one_liner: Constellation Energy's earnings beat and Micron's surge confirm AI capex demand is broadening from GPU compute into memory chips and nuclear power infrastructure, lifting the full AI supply chain.

candidates.theme: US Consumer Confidence-Spending Divergence — Sentiment at Record Lows While Hard Data Holds, Flagging Deferred Recession Risk
candidates.news_one_liner: April jobs beat confirms US labor resilience but forecloses near-term Fed cuts, sustaining stagflation risk as oil-driven inflation compounds consumer cost pressure.

candidates.theme: Non-Tariff Barrier Trade Fragmentation — UNCTAD Quantifies 10% LDC Export Loss as Deglobalization Extends Beyond Tariff Disputes
candidates.news_one_liner: UNCTAD finds LDCs losing 10% of G20 exports to non-tariff barriers, deepening trade fragmentation beyond headline tariff disputes and pressuring EM commodity exporters.

candidates.theme: SEC ESG Enforcement Activation — Sustainability Disclosure Mandates Shift From Voluntary to Coercive Compliance Phase
candidates.news_one_liner: SEC enforcement of sustainability disclosures raises compliance costs for energy and materials firms, accelerating mandatory ESG reporting across US markets.

candidates.theme: Commercial Space Launch Sector Institutionalization — Rocket Lab Record Contract and 2027 Breakeven Path Signal Government Demand Inflection
candidates.news_one_liner: Rocket Lab's record contract and 2027 breakeven path unlock institutional buying as commercial space transitions from speculative to earnings-visible.

candidates.theme: JEPI Covered-Call ETF Structural Flaw — Retirement Income Strategy Downgrade Exposes Distribution Sustainability Risk for Millions
candidates.news_one_liner: JEPI's Sell downgrade on $40B in AUM exposes millions of retirees to recurring distribution cuts as covered-call mechanics lag bull market recoveries.

candidates.theme: European Defense Spending Structural Acceleration — US Troop Withdrawal Forces NATO Burden-Sharing Recalibration
candidates.news_one_liner: Trump's ceasefire call failed immediately as both sides traded violation accusations, closing the last diplomatic off-ramp and cementing multi-year defense procurement tailwinds for LMT, RTX, and NOC.

candidates.theme: UK Trumpflation Stagflation — Dual Energy and Tariff Shock Erodes British Savers' Real Wealth as BoE Rate Hold Fails to Keep Pace
candidates.news_one_liner: UK savers are losing real wealth as energy and tariff inflation outpaces deposit rates, threatening UK banks, retailers, and sterling.

candidates.theme: PLA Leadership Purge Escalation — Suspended Death Sentences for Two Former Defense Ministers Signal Sustained Chinese Military Command Instability
candidates.news_one_liner: China's death sentences for two ex-defense ministers deepen PLA command uncertainty, raising tail-risk premiums for Taiwan-exposed tech and semiconductor names.

candidates.theme: AI Capital Markets Integration — Anthropic Wall Street JV Exploration Signals Frontier Model Pivot to Finance as Federal Exclusion Redirects Commercial Strategy
candidates.news_one_liner: Google Cloud and Genpact's agentic AI deal for CFO offices extends AI-finance integration into enterprise operations, threatening SAP and Oracle while boosting GOOGL cloud revenue durability.

candidates.news_one_liner: California's State Farm enforcement action escalates insurance market regulatory risk, pressuring P&C insurer stocks with high-catastrophe-state exposure.

candidates.theme: Sports Finance Institutionalization — William Blair-Inner Circle Sports Acquisition Confirms PE-Driven Franchise M&A as Mainstream Advisory Vertical
candidates.news_one_liner: William Blair buying Inner Circle Sports confirms PE-driven sports franchise M&A has matured into a mainstream institutional advisory vertical.

candidates.theme: Corporate Bitcoin Treasury Model Under Fire — Schiff's 'Ponzi' Critique Highlights Leveraged Accumulation Risk at Strategy Inc.
candidates.news_one_liner: Capital B's €114M potential BTC capacity and record-low short interest in crypto equities confirm corporate treasury model expansion into Europe with reduced bearish pushback.

candidates.theme: Unconstrained Bond Fund Renaissance — Rate Volatility and Geopolitical Uncertainty Drive Institutional Capital to Flexible Fixed Income
candidates.news_one_liner: Flexible bond funds are outperforming as rate volatility rewards unconstrained mandates, drawing institutional capital away from passive fixed income benchmarks.
